basic_details.job_title: ACEM DRDO Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Posts
basic_details.short_information: Defence Research and Development Organisation Advanced Centre for Energetic Materials (ACEM DRDO) has released the official Paid Internship Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the ACEM DRDO Paid Internship Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 28 years with a qualification of pursuing Engineering Degree (7th/8th semester) or M.Tech (1st/IInd year) full-time course in the respective discipline from a recognised Indian University/Institute can apply offline on or before 15 June 2026. The official notification PDF and offline appl

qualification.details: Pursuing Engineering Degree (7th/8th semester) or M.Tech (1st/IInd year) full time course in the respective discipline from a recognised Indian University/Institute.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Mechanical / Armament Engineering / Defence Technology / Production Engineering etc.
Aero Engineering / Rocket Propulsion System etc.
AI&ML / Data Science / System Engineering etc.

selection_process: Merit/Interview/Interaction Shortlisting based on academic record (>=85% or >=8.5 CGPA)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ACEM DRDO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ACEM DRDO Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ACEM DRDO Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the ACEM DRDO Paid Internship is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates should be pursuing an Engineering Degree (7th/8th semester) or M.Tech (1st/IInd year) full-time course in a relevant discipline from a recognized Indian University or Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ACEM DRDO Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this internship is 28 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered for this internship?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000/- per month during the internship period.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Paid Internship at ACEM DRDO?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Paid Internship posts at ACEM DRDO.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ACEM DRDO Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Merit/Interview/Interaction, with shortlisting done based on academic records (>=85% or >=8.5 CGPA).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this internship?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this internship.

faq.question: Q9. Where is ACEM DRDO located?
faq.answer: ACEM DRDO is located in Nashik, Maharashtra, with the pincode 422207.

faq.question: Q10. When will the internship training commence?
faq.answer: The internship training is scheduled to commence on 1st July 2026.
